title: shiftx cell type for firrtl backend not supported
body:
@azidar 

I am doing `read_verilog` followed by `write_firrtl`.  I get this error message:

`ERROR: Cell type not supported: $memwr (FinishQueue_1.$memwr$\ram$Top.DefaultConfig.v:74388$15603)`

      always @(posedge clk) begin
        if(reset) begin
          full <= 1'h0;
        end else if(T2) begin
          full <= do_enq;
        end
        if (do_enq)
          ram[1'h0] <= T6; // <-- right here
      end

`read_verilog` followed by `write_verilog` _does_ work.

Forgive my preliminary-only debug.  It does not appear that `verilog_backend.cc` does anything special something specific for `$memrd`:

See:

https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/master/backends/verilog/verilog_backend.cc#L900
_vs_
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/master/backends/firrtl/firrtl.cc#322

There is mention of FIXME for `$memrd` in `verilog_backend.cc`
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/master/backends/verilog/verilog_backend.cc#L1114

(Assumption)  Perhaps there was an internal API/IR change that was not regressed on the firrtl backend?
